description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines the variables PROJECT_NAME=EV3TreevisASPApp, SUBMODULE1_DIR=Ev3TreeVis, SUBMODULE1_PROJECTNAME=Ev3TreeVisApp and sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to normal. Add a global before_script that echoes "starting build for %PROJECT_NAME%", echoes "Restoring NuGet Packages...", runs nuget restore "%PROJECT_NAME%.sln", then changes directory to %SUBMODULE1_DIR% and runs nuget restore "%SUBMODULE1_PROJECTNAME%.sln" before returning to the root. Define a single stage named build and a job called build that runs in this stage, executing echo "Release build..." followed by the MSBuild command "\"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2017\\Community\\MSBuild\\15.0\\Bin\\MSBuild.exe\" /maxcpucount /nologo /property:Configuration=Release \"%PROJECT_NAME%.sln\" /p:DeployOnBuild=True /p:PublishProfile=\"EV3TreeVis - Web Deploy.pubxml\" /p:Password=%AZURE_DEPLOY_PASSWORD% /p:Username=\"$EV3TreeVis\"". The pipeline runs on a Windows runner (no Docker image or services are specified) and has no additional caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
